## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] No new external dependencies (or justified in description)
- [ ] No secrets added to tests, fixtures, or docs
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
